title: Korak 15

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
NUMBER_OF_DISKS = 3
number_of_moves = 2**NUMBER_OF_DISKS - 1
rods = {
    'A': list(range(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 0, -1)),
    'B': [],
    'C': []
}

def move(n, source, auxiliary, target):
    
    print(rods)

# initiate call from source A to target C with auxiliary B
move(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 'A', 'B', 'C')

tests.text: Trebalo bi da koristite dostavljeni tekst za dodavanje komentara pre vašeg poziva print().

description: Dodajte više komentara pre vašeg poziva/spominjanja print() navodeći display starting configuration.
